portfolio.subtitle: Anastasia Bakastikova
aboutSection.name: Who am I
aboutSection.title: Illustrator based in Udine.
aboutSection.body: I collaborate with magazines, agencies, and events in Friuli-Venezia Giulia since 2023.
home.extraSection1.name: Approach
home.extraSection1.title: Visual narratives with a clear voice
home.extraSection1.body: I draw inspiration from the Italy that is lived every day — the morning light, the scent of coffee, a sky changing color in the late afternoon. In my work, I aim to capture the moment: that fraction of a second when a scene still has warmth, movement, life. I live and work in Friuli-Venezia Giulia, a region that has taught me that beauty doesn't need to be loud.
home.extraSection2.name: Contact
home.extraSection2.title: I'm available for collaborations on editorial projects, events, brands, and applied illustration.
